title: Help Your Co-developers Grow - By Meeting Them Where They Are
summary: I have published a short video about helping your co-developers grow - by meeting them where they are and helping them grow from there. This advice may sound benign, but I have seen how well it works when done well, and I have also seen how poorly it works when developers ignore this advice, and scorn their co-developers for not having the "sufficient" know…
content:
I have published a short video about helping your co-developers grow - by meeting them where they are and helping them grow from there.
                This advice may sound benign, but I have seen how well it works when done well, and I have also seen how poorly
                it works when developers ignore this advice, and scorn their co-developers for not having the "sufficient" knowledge level.
